adas.title: ADAS System
adas.subtitle: Autonomous Emergency Braking (AEB)
adas.description: AEB warns the driver of a potential frontal collision while driving and automatically activates the brakes to prevent an accident.

highStrengthSteel.title: Safety-prioritized design
highStrengthSteel.subtitle: 79% high-strength steel
highStrengthSteel.description: The use of high-strength steel (79%) and ultra-high-strength steel (40%) applied through the Hot Press Forming (HPF) process maximizes the vehicle's body rigidity and passenger safety.

airbags.title: Keeping all occupants safe
airbags.subtitle: 7 Airbags
airbags.description: The vehicle is equipped with two airbags for the driver and front passenger, one knee airbag for the driver, two side airbags in the first row, and two curtain airbags for the second row.

esc.title: Secured safety in all driving conditions
esc.subtitle: Electronic Stability Control (ESC)
esc.description: ESC provides various features to prevent accidents in advance by ensuring stable vehicle posture control in a variety of driving conditions.

additional.description: Advanced safety technologies and systems designed to protect you and your passengers in all driving conditions.

seats.subtitle: 8-way power-adjustable front seats
seats.description: Featuring an 8-way power-adjustable driver seat with 2-way lumbar support, and 6-way power-adjustable seat to provide a comfortable driving experience.

magicTray.title: Luggage space efficiency
magicTray.subtitle: Magic tray
magicTray.description: Can be easily removed or installed as needed, allowing for the storage of various items beneath the flat space, enhancing luggage space efficiency.

airConditioning.title: Air quality control
airConditioning.subtitle: Front dual zone auto air conditioning system
airConditioning.description: The temperatures for the driver and front passenger seats can be independently adjusted, and a micro air conditioning filter has been applied to ensure a more comfortable environment.

statement.title: OF JOY

lifestyle.title: ENJOYMENT
lifestyle.subtitle: in Every Journey with Mobility
lifestyle.paragraph1: From the anticipation before the drive, the comfort and happiness during the journey, to the satisfaction upon arrival, and the cherished memories at the destination.
lifestyle.paragraph2: KGM is dedicated to making every moment you spend with your car enjoyable.

diverseLifestyles.title: FINDING JOY
diverseLifestyles.subtitle: Diverse Lifestyles
diverseLifestyles.paragraph: Whether you seek simple happiness with your family, enjoy your freedom alone, strive for a sophisticated life in a busy city, or relish outdoor adventures on weekends, KGM aims to enhance your joy and ensure it is never interrupted, anytime, anywhere.

essenceVideo.title: Enjoy with Confidence
essenceVideo.paragraph1: From the many small daily joys in the city
essenceVideo.paragraph2: To the diverse outdoor experiences in nature,
essenceVideo.paragraph3: KGM strives to provide mobility that allows customers to confidently enjoy every moment of any lifestyle,
essenceVideo.paragraph4: offering more reliable safety and intuitive, convenient practicality, differentiating itself from other brands.

confidence.title: Enjoy with Confidence
confidence.subtitle: Reasons to have Confidence in KGM

differently.title: DIFFERENTLY
differently.description: We pursue unique and robust designs that differentiate us from competitors.

safely.title: SAFELY
safely.description: We implement various systems to prevent accidents and build sturdy vehicle bodies to protect passengers.

freely.title: FREELY
freely.description: We offer a practical and creative lineup and customization options that satisfy diverse lifestyles.

robustArchitecture.title: Robust Architecture
robustArchitecture.description: We move beyond simple forms, pursuing beauty in robust structures and detailed aesthetics.

vibrantContrast.title: Vibrant Contrast
vibrantContrast.description: We express the essence of strength through contrasts in color, texture, and form.

unexpectedDelight.title: Unexpected Delight
unexpectedDelight.description: We design with value beyond transportation, providing joy and inspiration to customers.

communionWithNature.title: Communion with Nature
communionWithNature.description: We harmonize with nature, providing emotional value to our customers.

manifestoContent.title: KGM is evolving
manifestoContent.subtitle: Enjoy with Confidence
manifestoContent.paragraph1: We are transforming into a company that satisfies diverse urban and outdoor lifestyles with practical, creative, and safe mobility solutions, satisfying and bringing joy to our customers.
manifestoContent.paragraph2: The new value system was developed to communicate KGM's direction both internally and externally, provide guidelines for mid-to long-term strategies, and encourage changes in employee behavior, ultimately aiming to shift consumer brand perception.

journeyContent.title: ENJOYMENT
journeyContent.subtitle: in Every Journey with Mobility
journeyContent.paragraph1: From the anticipation before the drive, the comfort and happiness during the journey, to the satisfaction upon arrival, and the cherished memories at the destination.
journeyContent.paragraph2: KGM is dedicated to making every moment you spend with your car enjoyable.

protectingCustomers.title: Protecting Our Customers' Joy
protectingCustomers.description: For KGM, safety is an uncompromisable value that protects both the physical well-being of passengers and their enjoyment with the car. We prevent accidents with advanced driver assistance systems and ensure safety with robust vehicle bodies and reliable quality, doing our utmost to keep customers safe even through unforeseen incidents.

protectingEmployees.title: Protecting Our Employees' Joy
protectingEmployees.description: We create a safe working environment where every employee can work with confidence and pride, contributing to the satisfaction and well-being of all.

hero.title: Heritage 1954
hero.description1: A company that has always pursued 'firsts' in history.
hero.description2: KGM, the first Korean company to export cars and the pioneer of the Korean RV market, will move forward with our valued customers for the next 100 years.

corporateHistory.title: A master spirit of Korea's first title

milestones.196705: Cooperative agreement with Shinjin Motors Co., Ltd.
milestones.196708: First exported large buses to Brunei in Korea
milestones.196911: Produced the first civilian-purpose four-wheel drive vehicles in South Korea
milestones.197404: Co-established Shinjin Jeep Motor Co., Ltd. with AMC
milestones.197410: Developed both hard top and soft top jeeps
milestones.197702: Company name changed to Dong-A Motor Co., Ltd.
milestones.197903: Company name changed to Shinjin Motors Co., Ltd.
milestones.198103: Company name changed to Gohwa Motor Inc.
milestones.198404: First exported high-speed buses to Libya, Sudan in Korea
milestones.198508: First developed house trailer in Korea

philosophy.title: PHILOSOPHY
philosophy.subtitle: KGM is a family company of the KG Group.

value1.title: KG exists to become a respected company that makes everyone proud.
value1.description: Our purpose is to earn respect by providing new value that contributes to human and societal advancement, and to be an organization that our members can be proud of.

value2.title: KG maintains a balance between sustainability and growth.
value2.description: We achieve our vision with meaningful persistence and ethical, positive growth.

value3.title: KG pursues innovation to create unique and differentiated values.
value3.description: We consistently challenge ourselves with new methods that we have never tried before, and seek novelty to create things that no one has ever thought of.

value4.title: KG has confidence with courtesy based on a sense of responsibility.
value4.description: We clearly understand our responsibilities and deliver results that reflect the value we provide.

hero.title: RECYCLING
hero.description: Committed to environmental responsibility through sustainable practices and circular economy principles

introduction.paragraph1: KGM (formerly SsangYong) is committed to developing eco-friendly products by improving recycling rates and limiting hazardous heavy metals. These efforts aim to minimize environmental pollution from the production stage to the vehicle disposal phase.
introduction.paragraph2: Vehicles developed under our procedures meet EU ELV (End-of-Life Vehicle) standards, with ongoing compliance through updates and maintenance.

automotiveRecycling.title: Automotive Recycling
automotiveRecycling.content: KGM adheres to the EU End-of-Life Vehicle Directive (2000/53/EC) to minimize environmental issues. We approach this from product development, including using optimal materials for recyclability, designing vehicles for easy dismantling, and considering recycling and recovery during disposal. Since 2015, our vehicles have a recycling and recovery rate of over 95%.

heavyMetals.title: Restriction of Four Heavy Metals
heavyMetals.content: KGM is committed to reducing environmental pollution from heavy metals. We joined the IMDS (International Material Data System) in 2007, a global system for monitoring materials, weights, and substances in vehicle parts. Since 2015, we have systematically managed the use of four major heavy metals (lead, mercury, cadmium, and hexavalent chromium) by integrating IMDS with our proprietary KRMS (KGM Recycle & Material Management System).

dismantlingInfo.title: Dismantling Information for End-of-Life Vehicles
dismantlingInfo.content: KGM has been a member of the IDIS (International Dismantling Information System) since 2001, providing dismantling information for all vehicles produced to promote environmentally friendly vehicle dismantling.

footer.copyright: COPYRIGHT © KG MOBILITY Corp. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.

structuralRigidity.title: Structural rigidity
structuralRigidity.subtitle: Quadruple-layered frame
structuralRigidity.description: Unlike a monocoque body type vehicle, the engine and suspension are mounted on a steel frame; this ensures safety upon impacts while also optimizing noise control from external sources.

safetyDesign.subtitle: 78% High-strength steel
safetyDesign.description: By applying the HPF (Hot Press Forming) process with high-strength (44%) and ultra-high-strength (34%) steel plates, the rigidity of the body and passenger safety have been maximized.

airbags.subtitle: 7 Airbags

aeb.title: Autonomous Emergency Braking (AEB)
aeb.subtitle: ADAS System
aeb.description: AEB warns the driver of a potential frontal collision while driving and automatically activates the brakes to prevent an accident.

tsa.title: Trailer Stability Assist (TSA)
tsa.subtitle: Safer steering when towing
tsa.description: When towing a trailer or caravan, TSA stabilizes steering control in response to side-to-side swaying caused by harsh road conditions.

mcb.title: Multi Collision Brake (MCB)
mcb.subtitle: Advanced ESC system
mcb.description: After an accident occurs, the MCB prevents secondary accidents through automatic emergency braking when the driver is temporarily unable to control the vehicle.

enhanced.title: Enhanced Safety Systems
enhanced.subtitle: Additional safety features
enhanced.description: Comprehensive safety features including advanced driver assistance systems and protective technologies for maximum peace of mind.

tailgate.title: Internal tailgate opening button
tailgate.subtitle: A convenient space when exploring the wild
tailgate.description: The tailgate includes an internal button that allows you to open and close the tailgate from inside the vehicle, making it convenient for camping in the car.

monitoring.title: 3D 360° around view monitoring system
monitoring.subtitle: Blind spot monitoring
monitoring.description: Four cameras on the exterior monitor parking and driving, helpfully providing a clear view of the rear and ground areas.

seats.title: 8-way power-adjustable front seats
seats.subtitle: Driving comfort
seats.description: Featuring an 8-way powered seat with 2-way lumbar support (for adjusting the lower backrest), providing a comfortable driving environment tailored to anyone's needs.

cargo.title: Seating configurations
cargo.subtitle: Best-in-class luggage space
cargo.description: Offering a class-leading cargo space of 1,662 litres, suitable for various outdoor activities.

airConditioning.title: Front dual zone auto air conditioning system
airConditioning.subtitle: Air quality control
airConditioning.description: Including a micro air conditioning filter, auto defogging, and after-blow functions for a more comfortable ride.

awd.title: Active AWD
awd.subtitle: Four-wheel drive system
awd.description: Real-time monitoring and optimal power distribution for efficient and safe driving.

engine.title: 1.5 litre GDI turbo engine
engine.subtitle: Powerful engine
engine.description: 163 PS at 5,000-5,500 rpm and 280 Nm torque at 1,500-4,000 rpm for lively performance.

transmission.title: 'Shift by Wire' Toggle Switch

transmission.description: Easy control with AISIN 6-speed transmission for proven durability and reliable shifting.

idleStop.title: Idle Stop & Go system
idleStop.subtitle: Drive economically
idleStop.description: Automatic engine shut-off when stationary to improve fuel efficiency. (can be switched on/off)

paddleShifts.title: Paddle shifts
paddleShifts.subtitle: Drive agility
paddleShifts.description: Manual mode shifting with steering wheel controls for quick response to driving situations.

epb.title: Electronic Parking Brake
epb.subtitle: EPB
epb.description: Toggle-switch type with auto hold function.

drivingModes.title: Driving modes
drivingModes.subtitle: Dynamic driving
drivingModes.description: Optimal performance with NORMAL/SPORT/WINTER modes integrating steering and suspension.

batterySpecs.subtitle: LFP blade battery
batterySpecs.description: Focusing on EV battery safety, the next-generation 73.4 kWh lithium iron phosphate battery ensures excellent impact safety and charging efficiency through the latest cell-to-pack technology.

performanceOptimization.subtitle: High-Voltage battery management system
performanceOptimization.description: This system proactively prepares for temperatures starting from 8°C, maintaining optimal performance and preventing durability degradation due to battery aging. (10-year/1,000,000 km warranty)

chargingRange.title: Charging and range
chargingRange.subtitle: Maximum driving range on a single charge: 462 km (WLTP standard)
chargingRange.description: When using a Level 2 or portable charger, the AVN system allows you to set the charging start and end times; with a Level 2 or fast charger, you can set a target charge level.
